evidence: Aeonian strongly resonates with permanence and continuation (timeless endurance), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic ontology (meaning of timelessness), independence (existing beyond time), essential/existential resonance (core existence beyond time), necessary lawfulness (inevitable timelessness), and sacred value (transcendent quality).

The word 'ageless' strongly resonates with permanence (temporal.permanence), cosmic scale (scale.cosmic), semantic meaning (ontological.semantic), and sacred value (value_generation.sacred). It implies independence from time (interconnection.independent) and touches essential resonance (resonance.essential). Understanding it requires deep comprehension (experience.comprehension), and its existence is necessary (lawfulness.necessary).

Agelessness strongly resonates with permanence and independence, aligning with existential and essential resonance. It operates at individual and structural ontological layers, understood through identification and comprehension, and holds sacred value beyond time.

The word 'dateless' strongly resonates with permanence (existing beyond time), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic meaning (conceptual transcendence), independent existence (no temporal dependency), existential resonance (core essence of existence), necessary existence (inevitability), comprehension (deep understanding of timeless concepts), and sacred value (transcendent significance). These scores reflect its alignment with timeless existence outside temporal constraints.

Endless resonates most strongly with temporal.permanence (existing beyond time), ontological.semantic (core meaning of timelessness), and resonance.essential (touching existence's core). Lower scores reflect its cosmic scope, necessity, and sacred transcendence.

Endlessness strongly resonates with permanence (timeless endurance), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic meaning (abstract concept), and existential/essential resonance (touching core existence). It also relates to comprehension (deep understanding) and sacred value (transcendent significance).

The word 'eon' resonates most strongly with existential and essential resonance (touching core timeless essence), stellar/cosmic scale (geological/astronomical timeframes), and semantic ontology (its meaning as a timeless measure). Scores reflect alignment with concepts of permanence beyond ordinary time and comprehension of timeless structures.

Eonian, as timeless, strongly resonates with permanence beyond time (temporal.permanence), cosmic scale (scale.cosmic), semantic meaning (ontological.semantic), independent existence (interconnection.independent), existential resonance (resonance.existential), necessary existence (lawfulness.necessary), deep comprehension (experience.comprehension), and sacred value (value_generation.sacred).

Eternal strongly resonates with permanence beyond time (temporal.permanence 10), cosmic scale (scale.cosmic 10), and existential resonance (resonance.existential 10). It aligns with semantic meaning (ontological.semantic 10), independence (interconnection.independent 10), necessary lawfulness (lawfulness.necessary 10), comprehension (experience.comprehension 10), and sacred value (value_generation.sacred 10). Lower scores reflect weak but real connections like categorization (epistemological.identification 2) and abstract understanding (epistemological.understanding 5).

The word 'eternally' strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (10) as it denotes enduring beyond normal timeframes. It aligns with scale.cosmic (10) due to its universal scope beyond temporal constraints. Resonance.essential (10) and resonance.existential (10) reflect its core and existence-level connection to timelessness. Additionally, ontological.semantic (7) and value_generation.sacred (7) highlight its conceptual and transcendent aspects.

Eternity resonates strongly with permanence (existing beyond time), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic meaning (core essence), independence (no temporal dependency), essential/existential resonance (touching existence itself), and sacred value (transcendent). Lower scores reflect weak but real connections like identification as a named concept, understanding its structure, and aesthetic associations.

The highest scores reflect 'everlasting' as a timeless, universal (cosmic) concept rooted in permanence and necessity. Its semantic core (ontological.semantic) and existential resonance (resonance.existential) align with timeless essence. Lower scores acknowledge its abstract understanding and independent existence.

Everlastingly strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (10) as it denotes enduring beyond normal timeframes. It also connects to resonance.essential (7) and value.sacred (7) due to its association with timeless, transcendent existence. Moderate scores reflect its semantic meaning (ontological.semantic 5) and independence from temporal constraints (interconnection.independent 5).

Everlastingness strongly resonates with permanence (existing beyond time), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic ontology (core meaning), essential/existential resonance (touching the essence of existence), necessary lawfulness (inevitability of timeless existence), and sacred value (transcendent quality). Lower scores reflect weak but real connections to identification (as a named concept), understanding (requiring deep grasp), and independent interconnection (existing outside temporal dependencies).

Evermore strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (10) and resonance.essential (10), as it connotes enduring beyond temporal constraints. It also aligns with ontological.semantic (7) due to its association with timeless meaning and value.sacred (8) for transcendent connotations.

The word 'forever' strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (10) and temporal.continuation (8) as it denotes endless duration. It aligns with scale.cosmic (10) due to its universal scope beyond time. Resonance.essential (10) and resonance.existential (10) reflect its core and existence-level connection to timelessness. Lawfulness.necessary (10) underscores its inevitability as a timeless state, while value.sacred (10) captures its transcendent quality. Lower scores reflect weaker but real ties to identification (3), understanding (5), structural (5), and comprehension (5).

The phrase emphasizes unending continuation (temporal.continuation) and permanence beyond normal time (temporal.permanence), directly aligning with FND.timeless. It resonates deeply with the core essence (resonance.essential) and existence-level (resonance.existential) of timelessness. Its poetic expression (value_generation.aesthetic) and experiential conveyance (epistemological.experience) add secondary resonance.

Interminable resonates weakly with temporal.permanence (enduring beyond normal timeframes) and temporal.continuation (ongoing persistence), as both imply extended duration. However, FND.timeless refers to existing *outside* time entirely, so these connections are indirect and limited.

The word 'lasting' in the context of FND.timeless (existing outside time) strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (enduring beyond time), scale.cosmic (universal scope), and resonance.existential (touching fundamental existence). It also aligns with interconnection.independent (existing autonomously), value_generation.sacred (transcendent value), and ontological.semantic/epistemological.understanding/experience.comprehension (conceptual depth).

The highest scores reflect 'long' resonating with permanence (existing beyond normal timeframes) and essential resonance (touching the core of timeless existence). Weak connections exist in understanding (grasping timelessness requires conceptualizing duration) and structural ontology (timelessness as an organizing principle).

The word 'permanent' in the context of FND.timeless strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (direct match), resonance.essential (core essence of existence), and value.sacred (transcendent value). It also aligns with interconnection.independent (existing without dependency), lawfulness.necessary (inevitability of timeless existence), and comprehension (deep understanding required).

The word 'perpetual' strongly resonates with permanence and continuation in time, semantic meaning, independent existence, essential/existential resonance, lawful predictability/necessity, and sacred transcendence. These scores reflect its core alignment with timeless existence, free from temporal constraints.

Perpetuity resonates strongly with permanence (enduring beyond time), cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic ontology (abstract meaning), independence (existing outside temporal influence), existential resonance (touching existence itself), necessary lawfulness (inevitability), comprehension (deep understanding required), and sacred value (transcendent quality). These slots align with its definition of timeless existence, while others lack direct relevance.

The word 'timeless' strongly resonates with permanence beyond time (temporal.permanence), cosmic scale (scale.cosmic), and essential resonance (resonance.essential). It requires deep comprehension (experience.comprehension) and is tied to aesthetic value (e.g., art, design) and occasionally sacred transcendence (value.sacred). Its independence from time (interconnection.independent) and necessary existence (lawfulness.necessary) reflect its core essence.

Timelessness resonates strongly with cosmic scale (universal scope), semantic ontology (core meaning), independent interconnection (existing outside time), essential/existential resonance (touching core essence of existence), comprehension (deep understanding), and sacred value (transcendent beyond ordinary value).

The word 'unaltered' strongly resonates with permanence (timeless endurance), existential resonance (core existence outside time), and essential resonance (touching the unchanging essence). It also aligns with independence (no external influence altering it), predictability (unchanging behavior), and comprehension (understanding its timeless nature).

Uncessing strongly resonates with temporal.continuation (10) and temporal.permanence (10), as it implies unending endurance beyond normal time. Resonance.essential (10) and resonance.existential (8) reflect its core alignment with timeless existence. Lawfulness.predictable (7) and value.sacred (5) highlight its inevitability and transcendent quality.

The word 'unchanged' strongly resonates with permanence (existing beyond normal timeframes), independence (existing without external influence), essential resonance (core essence of timelessness), and predictability (unchanging nature aligns with strict regularity). These scores reflect the unchanging, eternal nature of the concept.

The word 'unending' strongly resonates with temporal.permanence (enduring beyond normal timeframes), resonance.essential (touching the core essence of existence), and resonance.existential (fundamental, existence-level connection). It also lightly connects to semantic meaning, understanding timeless concepts, independent existence, and sacred value. Lower scores reflect its lack of ties to time-based processes or scale-dependent phenomena.
